headers: C heck the flow with each new pen

rows.C heck the flow with each new pen:
If your Wegovy pen is already in use, go to ‘2 Set your dose’.
Only check the Wegovy flow before your first injection with each
new pen.
Turn the dose selector until you see the flow check symbol
( ).
(See figure F).

Make sure the flow check symbol lines up with the dose pointer.
(See figure G).
